channel.title: Unseen Scars Blog
channel.description: Trauma-informed insights, emotional healing tools, and supportive resources for adults recovering from emotional neglect.

item.title: Why 'Fine' Is the Most Dangerous Word in Your Vocabulary
item.description: A trauma-informed look at why 'fine' becomes a survival strategy for emotionally neglected adults and how this tiny word hides overwhelm, numbness, and self-abandonment

item.title: 10 Signs Someone Is Gaslighting You
item.description: If you’ve been doubting your own reality, replaying conversations, or wondering whether you’re “overreacting,” this piece will help you name what’s really happening. These 10 signs reveal how gaslighting erodes your self‑trust and how to start reclaiming it.

item.title: Why Narcissists Come Back and How to Stop Them
item.description: They don’t return because they’ve changed. They return because they need supply. This trauma‑informed breakdown explains the psychology behind narcissistic hoovering, the love‑bomb cycle, and how to stop the manipulation before it starts.
